programme.title: Dangerous Affection
programme.desc: A Seattle detective falls for a pregnant woman whose young son may be able to help with a murder case.

programme.title: Arlington Road [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Widowed when his FBI agent wife is killed by an extremist group, college professor Michael Faraday (Jeff Bridges) becomes obsessed with the culture of these groups -- especially when his new all-American neighbors, Oliver (Tim Robbins) and Cheryl Lang (Joan Cusack), start acting suspiciously. With each twist, the mystery deepens and questions loom whether Faraday is consumed by fear and driven by paranoia, or whether a lethal conspiracy has been born on Arlington Road.

programme.title: Hollow Creek
programme.desc: Trying to find inspiration for his next horror novel, Blake retreats to the Appalachian Mountains with his mistress, Angelica. When she disappears, Blake becomes a prime suspect.

programme.title: The Air I Breathe [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: A drama based on an ancient Chinese proverb that breaks life down into four emotional cornerstones: happiness, pleasure, sorrow and love.

programme.title: Big Bad Mama [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Mama and daughters get forced by circumstances into bootlegging and bank robbing, and travel across the country trailed by the law.

programme.title: Avenging Angelo
programme.desc: A woman discovers she is the daughter of a murdered mafia chieftain and seeks revenge with the aid of her father's faithful bodyguard (Academy Award nominee Sylvester Stallone, "Rocky").

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: A Better Tomorrow [English-Language Version] [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: A reforming ex-gangster tries to reconcile with his estranged policeman brother, but the ties to his former gang are difficult to break.

programme.title: Agent Red [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Captain Matt Hendricks and Dr. Linda Christian are locked in a submarine with Russian terrorists that threaten to launch a chemical virus on US territory.

programme.title: Les mystères de Jane 1 : héritage perdu
programme.desc: Jane Da Silva hérite d'une agence de détectives. Sur sa première affaire, elle découvre qu'il est dangereux de fouiller le passé.

programme.title: Les mystères de Jane 2 : une prescription mortelle
programme.desc: Jane cherche à aider un adolescent emprisonné à tort pour meurtre.

programme.title: Les mystères de Jane 3 : meurtre à Moseby
programme.desc: Jane se rend à son université incognito pour aider son petit ami à résoudre un crime dont il aurait été témoin des années auparavant.

programme.title: Les mystères de Jane 4 : trop de choses à perdre
programme.desc: Jane Da Silva enquête sur la disparition d'une journaliste qui s'est volatilisée après avoir gagné un jeu télévisé.

programme.title: Anatomy Of A Murder
programme.desc: When his wife clames she was raped, an army lieutenant kills her attacker and hires a lawyer to defend him.

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: The leader of the Norwegian underground is enlisted by British intelligence to aid in destroying a factory.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: A U.S. Army tank crew joins a band of stragglers in a desperate search for water in the war-torn North desert.

programme.title: Wish Upon
programme.desc: Jonathan Shannon (Ryan Phillippe) gives his 17-year-old daughter Clare (Joey King) an old music box that promises to grant its owner seven wishes. Skeptical at first, Clare becomes seduced by its dark powers when her life starts to radically improve with each wish. Everything seems perfect until she realizes that every wish she makes causes the people who are closest to her to die in violent and elaborate ways.

programme.title: CAT. 8
programme.desc: An advanced security system can harness the power of the sun and destroy Earth.

programme.title: CAT. 8
programme.desc: A huge mass of solar plasma heads toward Earth and the atmosphere could be ignited in a matter of hours.

programme.title: 10.5: Apocalypse
programme.desc: An escalating series of quakes threatens to turn the United States into a wasteland, as Las Vegas collapses into a sinkhole.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Fifth Kind
programme.desc: Dr. Steve Greer presents information that the architects of secrecy don't want you to know.

programme.title: Faster Than The Grim Reaper
programme.desc: Air Zermatt, elite Matterhorn SAR team, braves Swiss mountain perils to save lives.

programme.title: The Smallest Piece
programme.desc: Air Zermatt, elite Matterhorn SAR team, braves Swiss mountain perils to save lives.

programme.desc: Air Zermatt, elite Matterhorn SAR team, braves Swiss mountain perils to save lives.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Get Off My Lawn!: It's a high-flying episode of The Cowboy Way. Misty surprises Cody with the gift of a thrilling ride on an aerobatic glider - only problem is, Cody is terrified of heights! Back on solid ground, some of the herd escapes into a neighboring trailer park. Can the guys wrangle them in before they do any real damage? Jaclyn starts the search for a new family home, but a rough dirt-road stands between them and their dream house. And it's down to the wire for the cowboys' cattle deal as the guys try to find a buyer before their million-dollar herd runs out of grass.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Done Deal: Bubba, Cody and Booger close their biggest cattle deal ever on The Cowboy Way! The million-dollar herd is ready to ship, but moving all that cattle into trucks becomes a race against the clock for their much-needed final paycheck. The cowboys help a woman remove cattle from her family's land when she is forced to sell the property after the passing of her parents. Having been through a similar situation, Booger is inspired to fix-up his family's old homestead as a special surprise for his grandma. Cody's book is finally finished, but as Misty plans the book-signing event, a missed shipment could derail the whole party. The Cattlemen's Association invites the guys to their annual ball, with a very special honor in store.

programme.title: Romance in the Wilds
programme.desc: Deep in the Rocky Mountains, lightning strikes a mining site, sparking a deadly wildfire and igniting an unexpected romance between a forest ranger and a geologist as they race to escape the flames.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Glass Chandeliers, Garden Tools, Western Saddles: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. At her first stop in Scottsdale, Arizona, she meets Newt Grover, who taught himself to blow glass at 40. His beautiful, larger-than-life chandeliers prove it's never too late to become a master. Next, she meets Bob Denman in Boring, Oregon, who is one of the last craftsmen in the world making hand-forged iron garden tools. Finally, in Marysville, California, Jill meets a leather working contradiction in terms: he's a Frenchman, named Pedro Pedrini, who carves incredible Western saddles.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - New Hampshire: In New Hampshire, "Live Free or Die" isn't just a motto, it's a way of life. On this episode of State Plate, Taylor Hicks will explore the liberated larder of a state that's truly free. First, Taylor will taste some fall-ready soup and find out the history of America's first fruit, the pumpkin. Next, he'll savor the freest dairy product in the union - New Hampshire's unpasteurized yogurt. Then, he'll find out what's like to be home on the free-range when he visits venison and white potato farms. And, finally Taylor will sample a dessert that tastes like cider, eats like cake, and has the freedom to claim both parties. It's the snacks of the citizenry on this episode of State Plate!

programme.title: Buffalo Keepers
programme.desc: Buffalo Keepers - Buffalo Keepers: Today, the buffalo is the quintessential symbol of strength, freedom, and the unspoiled American West. But in the late 1800s, the nation's buffalo were nearly wiped out by ruthless hide hunters. Those majestic herds, which once numbered in the tens of millions, were down to less than 500 animals. This is the story of the handful of determined men and women who mobilized to save the ones that were left in a last-ditch effort to stave off extinction. Ranchers like Charles and Mary Ann Goodnight rescued orphaned buffalo calves and built small herds. Former buffalo hunters like Buffalo Bill helped build public sympathy. And politicians like Theodore Roosevelt helped pass laws to protect the remaining animals. The effort would be a generational one, with buffalo herds carefully tended, bred, and passed down to new stewards when their old protectors passed away. Thanks to their efforts, there are an estimated 500,000 buffalo thundering across America's grasslands once again.

programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: The princess wants the Hwarangs to have a bloody fight as if they were in a real war, but they only pretend to spar because they do not want to harm any of their colleagues. Suspecting Seonu to be the King, Master Youngshil suggests a match between his guard and Seonu to see how Queen Jiso reacts.

programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: To maintain their alliances with Baekje, the Queen and the officials decide to send the Princess and a few members of Hwarang to see the Crown Prince of Baekje. It is Hwarang's first mission to escort the Princess as the amity delegates, but it is also dangerous that they might not be able to return safely.

programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: The Crown Prince of Baekje offers Princess Sookmyung a wedlock to keep peace between two nations. He also receives a secret letter that says the King of Silla is within the delegation. In order to find out who the faceless King is, he threatens to kill Silla hostages if the King doesn't reveal himself.

programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: In order to save Aro, Seonu claims himself to be the king of Silla. The Crown Prince of Baekje plans to kill him brutally and take over Silla, but Seonu suggests to have a sword fight and to release them if he wins.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.3
programme.desc: Back in her hometown, Mi Young is shocked to learn she's pregnant—and her mother finds out, too. Lee Gun heads to Mi Young's mom's ssambap restaurant with President Park. Yong plays a video of Lee Gun and Mi Young—found on Gun's USB—for Chairwoman Wang, but her unexpected reaction throws him off. Meanwhile, Mi Young goes alone to the OB-GYN clinic, where she meets Daniel.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.4
programme.desc: Disheartened after repeated failures to find his sister, Daniel is in a slump. Through Chief Tak, Gun learns about a mysterious stimulant. Mi Young moves into Gun's lavish home, but finds herself caught between Gun's coldness and the chairwoman's kindness.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.5
programme.desc: Startled by Gun's sudden chill after the wedding, Mi Young is taken aback when he even presents divorce papers. To steady him, Chairwoman Wang recommends a prenatal class for Mi Young, and Gun reluctantly attends. Meanwhile, Gun bumps into Daniel and Mi Young at the chairwoman's house.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.6
programme.desc: Outside the prenatal class, Gun and Mi Young run into one of Se Ra's friends, while Se Ra decides to return to Korea after her New York performance. Hearing that an industrial-waste plant is slated for Yeo-ul Island, Mi Young feels betrayed by Gun, and her sudden change in attitude starts to irk him.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.7
programme.desc: Gun grows uneasy about Daniel's presence, and Mi Young tries to keep her distance from Gun. Mi Ja arrives in Seoul with Mr. Choi and goes out with Mi Young upon hearing Gun sold the Yeo-ul Island factory, she's furious. Meanwhile, Gun suggests that he and Mi Young start sharing a room.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.8
programme.desc: Gun shows Mi Young around his office, but Se Ra's unexpected arrival flusters him. He tries to tell Se Ra about his marriage, but Mi Young stops him.

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Ep.16
programme.desc: Seo Do Jae navigates the complexities of dating a celebrity. Jung Joo Hwan meets with Yoo Woo Mi to discuss a new scandal. Kang Sa Ra makes a proposal to Eun Ho's parents.

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Ep.1
programme.desc: Han Se Gye senses something while at an awards ceremony and runs away, sending chaebol executive Seo Do Jae on a search for his missing spokesmodel.

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Ep.2
programme.desc: While dealing with the ramifications of her latest transformation, Han Se Gye grows suspicious of Seo Do Jae, who possesses his own eccentricities.

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Ep.3
programme.desc: While rampant rumors about them begin to swirl, Han Se Gye wonders why Seo Do Jae wants to help her, and whether he's telling her everything.

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.5
programme.desc: They say kids these days start with a kiss, but even after kissing twice, Sang-sik and Narae still haven't figured out exactly where they stand. What should we call this ambiguous relationship of ours? Meanwhile, Marketing Division 3 is taking on its first major project! Having heard the rumor that if Hyung-mi smiles, the project will be a huge success, the team members are going all out to make her laugh.Ever since witnessing Kang-mi's 17-to-1 fight, Ma-tan's heart has been racing uncontrollably. Carrying an emotion she can't quite pinpoint—whether it's fear or excitement—she sets off on a business trip with Sang-sik.

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.6
programme.desc: While observing the team members, he accidentally overhears Kang-mi's phone call… Could Kang-mi, whom he trusted, be the spy?Whether it was the alcohol or the medication, Sang-sik and Narae ended up kissing in a completely absurd moment. But after the kiss, Sang-sik not only sent the worst possible text—‘I'm sorry'—but also went on a blind date! Narae finds out and is furious. There's a spy among us! Matang senses that someone is leaking information to Baek Jo-won.

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.7
programme.desc: She tries to make up for her mistake by hosting a Gauss massage gun event!Narae is so annoyed with herself for getting along better with Sang-sik that she could die, but every time she gets close to him, she ends up with a bloody nose, bruises all over her body, and now even a cast... Fearing she might actually die if this keeps up, Narae issues a restraining order against Sang-sik. While Aziz is nursing her back to health, Narae discovers something and is shocked. ‘I used to dream of becoming a novelist.' They say a person's name reflects their nature—Literature got into big trouble for writing her written apology like a novel.

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.8
programme.desc: Sang-sik and Narae can't go a single day without arguing—it's like they have thorns in their mouths if they don't. But for some reason, today they're on the same page about absolutely everything. Right in the middle of all this, Narae hears that Sang-sik has found someone new to love. As she listens, she realizes, ‘Wait, this is totally my story.' Wait a minute—does Sang-sik really like me? A ‘goose dad' with a stomach ailment. Someone has appeared to soothe his lonely heart—not a game, but a real person. She's the one I never want to be apart from, even for a moment. And she is none other than… an AI speaker!

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.9
programme.desc: Kang-mi accidentally overhears that Matang is the heir to the Matang Power empire. Seeing that Kang-mi's tongue—which he thought was heavier than steel—is as light as a feather, Matang grows nervous. If things continue like this, it's only a matter of time before the news gets out.There was a tree that wouldn't fall no matter how many times he knocked on it. Sang-sik, knowing that Hae-young has a boyfriend, tries to end things cleanly… but Hae-young ends up confessing her feelings to him instead! Episode 4 – You Have to Let Go to Grow: The Hair Loss Management Device ‘Saerona'

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.10
programme.desc: The day Sang-sik decided to confess his feelings to Hae-young for the tenth time after five years of unrequited love! Of all days! Sang-sik ends up being seen by Hae-young while hugging Narae, his next-door neighbor! Begging Narae to clear up Hae-young's misunderstanding, Sang-sik pressures her… But when Narae goes to explain herself to Hae-young, she hears a shocking truth… Sang-sik's confession preparations. Is this really going to work out?

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.11
programme.desc: Meanwhile, Kang-mi is flustered when the person she kissed in her dream last night suddenly appears right in front of her. A new hire who suddenly joined Marketing Division 3, ‘White Horse.' But is this new hire really a new hire…?But then something happens that crosses that line for the two of them…. You don't meet your nemesis on a narrow plank bridge—you meet them at work. Cha Na-rae and Lee Sang-sik, who can't stand the sight of each other, weren't just sitting next to each other at the office—they were living next door! Na-rae and Sang-sik draw a line between them even more strictly than the 38th Parallel.

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.12
programme.desc: Lee Sang-sik, the troublemaker of Marketing Division 3! He's really caused a stir. A video commemorating the 50th anniversary of Gauss, which he had posted as private on his personal channel, was set to public without his knowledge. The small ball Sang-sik set rolling triggered a storm of controversy—leading not only to the chairman's summons by the prosecution but also to the threat of the division's dissolution…

programme.title: Country Club Adjacent
programme.desc: Country Club Adjacent - Country Club Adjacent: The Most Chaotic Back Off Challenge Ever – Can Anyone Stay Focused - BEST OF THE BACK OFF CHALLENGE PART 3: Join us for another Back Off Challenge in Michigan, where the chirps aren't the only thing falling from the sky! As hailstorms rain down mid-swing, these golfers face a course that's constantly changing underfoot. The pressure is on as gut-wrenching insults fly, and hilarious, off-the-wall compliments throw off their focus. Watch as they try to keep their cool in the face of wild weather, relentless chirps, and unpredictable greens. Can these golfers hold their own under such crazy conditions? What would be your strategy to keep your focus with both hail and chirps coming at you on the course? Also Best of Country Club Adjacent's Back Off Challenge

programme.title: Pin Shot
programme.desc: Pin Shot - Pin Shot: Kenwood: At Kenwood Country Club, hosts Jimmy Hanlin and Jim Day challenge golfers at the Beacon Orthopedics charity outing in Pin Shot. Contestants take aim at a 165-yard downhill par-3, trying to land on the green for prizes, hit target circles for bigger rewards, or sink a hole-in-one for a $50,000 jackpot benefiting charity. With pressure swings, near misses, and plenty of laughs, the duo delivers fast-paced golf fun from Cincinnati.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 2
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't get their turkey at the store and neither does Steven Rinella. On this special Holiday episode Steve cooks three enticing dishes: Wild Turkey Galantine, Smoked Black Bear Ham, and his take on the traditional Mincemeat Pie. Appetites will run large as Steve makes a special meal for his family and friends.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: True North: Alaska North Slope Caribou
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and special guest, the author Tim Ferriss, travel to the remote north slope of Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 1
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America, a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag, Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 2

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella crosses the border into Mexico's desert to call in the Gould's wild turkey. Of the five turkey subspecies in North America, the Gould's is the largest but rarest. On this unique Mexican adventure, Steve finds exciting action for gobbling toms. With locally made charcoal at his disposal, he'll grill up a big, brined, delicious bird.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend Ronny Boehme drive into the mountains of southwest Montana to hunt the high ridge tops for dusky grouse. Ronny's Bracco Italiano hunting dogs have been bred and trained for this work, but can Ronny handle the altitude? The duo prepares dusky grouse jalape√±o poppers and grouse fettuccine with a white wine and cream sauce.

programme.title: MeatEater

programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like they're on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but on this two-part episode Rinella grants his viewers an all-access pass to see just how the MeatEater crew works together to make the show. Strap-in for some behind-the-scenes action.

programme.sub-title: Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.desc: On this episode, Capt. Danny joins his brother Nick for a day of fishing for redfish in some of their local waters, but in a tournament mindset. Tune in to see how the Allen's go about strategizing a day of tournament fishing in hopes of getting some bragging rights and a check!

programme.title: Baitfuel Fishing Tournament
programme.desc: Qualifier 3 finds the tour anglers headed to the St. Lawrence River out of Brockville, Ontario.

programme.title: Sail Kings
programme.desc: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse Leboeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of Redfish and Tuna.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Nikki Boxler's life in Update New York on her family farm raising cattle and producing maple syrup is a few thousand miles from the hills of New Mexico. We'll take a look into Nikki's life back home and then follow along as she visits the small town of Quemado and its bustling population of 228, while she pursues bugling elk with her favorite Winchester in hand. We'll also head to Missouri and Texas to chase whitetails with Chris Keefer and Paul Sawyer.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: We set out to tell the tale of Marion - and his legendary Mack's Prairie Wings, smack dab in the middle of the world famous Stuttgart, Arkansas - the land of ducks and rice. Get an inside look at a man that many consider to be larger than life, from those that knew him best, like his cousin and fellow hell raiser, Bud McCollum. We'll even hear a story or two from Milton Stovesand, an 81 year old former waterfowl guide and Mack's employee who actually guided John Olin a time or two, and ran the timber holes with Marion. It's timber holes and tall tales. It's cups of coffee and cupped up wings. It's partners in business, and partners in potholes and it's pure Arkansas...just like Marion.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: On this weeks episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade and his daughter Asa take on the turkey woods together for the first time. As this is Asa's first time turkey hunting some quick pre hunt preparations are in order. Slade also was able to sit down with a good friend and registered forester to talk fire and the benefits of fire in land management. The next day, Asa and Slade were able to connect with a thundering tom as Asa punched her first ever turkey tag!

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.sub-title: Hunting Land Man - "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!
programme.desc: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade puts in some early summer farm work to Ensure his target bucks are well fed! Slade also Talks about his Target buck for the year, "Pope"! Slade is laying the trap early in hopes "Pope" makes a mistake early!

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.sub-title: Hunting Land Man - "Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!
programme.desc: Opening day in Mississippi has arrived and Slade is taking full advantage of it! With the weather not cooperating Slade and Zeb stumble into a turkey hunt they won't soon forget. Two days later, the hot streak continues with Slade connecting on another turkey on an 83 acre property he has for sale! Also, Slade gives some tips and his ideas on small acreage hunting, and how it can be just as lucrative as big tracks of land!

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Last summer Cam Rhoden and his family were told that he may never breath on his own again, much less walk. After meeting David Blanton during his rehab at the Shepherd Center, they made plans to go on a Georgia turkey hunt. Cam is not only walking - he's walking to a Georgia Gobbler!

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: We were honored to be a part of the Gold Star Youth Outdoors Turkey Hunt at Iron Horse Farms in Alabama. Cole Barthel and Bryan Brown were able to get Charlie Willington his first turkey. Be sure to check out Gold Star Youth Outdoors and Iron Horse Farms.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: 2 down, 1 to go. Anthony Virga's the next man up for a gobbler with Michael Pitts and Matt Garger in New York's Adirondack Mountains.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Second leg in the slam is complete! Justin Webb killed his Rio in Texas. Next stop - Tennessee for the Eastern.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Roger Culpepper takes Sophia Mahlke and her dad Tom to kill her first longbeard. The guys and girl find the gobblers on roost in a beautiful Georgia hardwood bottom and make their move.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Realtree's David Blanton pulls two Osceola Longbeards in on a string as he kicks off the 2025 turkey season in South Florida.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We love our members. We spent some time in camp with Ron Chandler. Ron Recently renewed his TTHA Membership in 2022 and was awarded a member hunt for 2023. We spend time reflecting on what hunting means to Ron and spending time in camp at G2 with hunters alike.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.sub-title: Storytellers - "Bucks for the Brave: Women's Hunt
programme.desc: Jennifer Brooks has spent her life answering the call to serve. From flying Blackhawk helicopters on multiple combat missions during two tours in Iraq to now serving as an Air Medical Pilot and first responder, her story is one of courage, sacrifice, and humility. In this episode of Storytellers, we join Jennifer in the field for a hunt that offers a rare moment to slow down, reflect, and honor a life dedicated to protecting others.

programme.title: Josh Sneed
programme.desc: It's hard being funny 24/7, but Josh Sneed does it, and that's why he became a stand-up comedian, to give his humor a “second chance at life.” In this Dry Bar Comedy special, Josh gives tips for people-watching (make sure your flash is off when you're taking pictures), and paints hilarious word caricatures of the people he's seen. Anyone who's been to Long John Silver's or Taco Bell (or the 2-in-1 version), will appreciate Josh's humor.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Tony Calabrese is frustrated with a few things: the Pope isn't Italian, vacations involve movement, and the AARP is the retired mafia.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: One of DryBar's youngest comics, Caleb Elliot proves that age is anything but a setback.

programme.title: Karen Rontowski
programme.desc: Karen Rontowski's fast-paced, quirky and charmingly optimistic comedy has been featured in clubs, TV, radio, and at corporate events all around the world. Her stand- up showcases endearing, self-effacing and intelligent characters that catch you by surprise every time. Karen uniquely blends comedy with her experience as a Paranormal Investigator and Reiki master. From fun with her family to her travels all over this great country Karen has fun where ever she goes. Her lighthearted confusion entertains kids of all ages. She is fascinated with the “afterlife” is convinced she will someday have a near death experience because, “I never finish anything.” She explains, “Sometimes a ghost will just do the same thing over and over in life. That's why I want to move into a house that is haunted by a maid." Karen's comedy is now featured in the new line of greeting cards called “Frank and Funny” sold at Target stores everywhere and is the comedy writer for “Haunted Magazine.” She is a regular on the Bob and Tom Radio Show and is a featured performer on their CD. Karen has appeared on The Late Show with David Letterman, Sirius Satellite Radio, Comics Unleashed, Comedy.com, Live at Gotham and Comedy Central. She has opened for show biz legends including Bob Hope, Ray Charles, David Brenner and the Monkees.

programme.title: Bengt Washburn
programme.desc: Bengt Washburn is an Aquarius with Hazel eyes who prefers boxer briefs, solid deodorants, and Crest toothpaste. He is 5'9? tall, weighs about 149 pounds and can bench 150 pounds three times without a spotter. He has a vertical leap of 16 inches. 8 years ago a lump appeared on his right thigh. It's not visible from the stage but according to some kids at the water park, it looks creepy. Many people say Bengt looks kind of like a monkey. Bengt Washburn was born in Salt Lake City, Utah but grew up in a large Utah town (1,200 people) as the fifth child in a small Mormon family (7 children). Bengt is married to an officer in the United States Airforce. They have lived in 6 different cities over the last eleven years. Most recently he moved to Springfield, Virginia (Washington D.C.) after living in Stuttgart, Germany for 3 years. Bengt is a former winner of the prestigious San Francisco International Comedy Competition. He has been seen on The Late Late Show with Craig Fergusen, Live at Gotham on Comedy Central and most recently Conan on TBS. He was invited to perform at the Vancouver International Comedy Festival, The Boston Comedy Festival, the Aspen Laff Festival and Gilda's Laugh Fest in Grand Rapids, Michigan. He's been heard on NPR, PRI and Bob and Tom. All three of his comedy Cd's can be heard playing on XM Sirius radio. Most people who know him would say Bengt is a logistically impaired ditz, but his comedy is described as intelligent, surprisingly universal considering the content matter and profoundly funny.

programme.title: Paul Morrissey
programme.desc: Paul was raised as a sports fanatic in the tiny town of Owego, in upstate New York. After four years of playing college basketball, somehow he graduated. Aside from playing in the NBA, his dream job was to talk about sports for a living. Paul then moved to California after landing a television sports anchor job but found out quickly that he was “too much of a smart-ass” for TV news. After he was fired, Paul took his unique sense of humor to comedy club stages all over the country. In 2005, Paul was selected to perform at the HBO Comedy Festival in Las Vegas. Morrissey has also been a finalist in several national comedy competitions including Wendy's Comedy Challenge, Comedy Central's Open Mic Fight and Maxim's Real Men of Comedy.

programme.title: Key Lewis
programme.sub-title: Half Black, Half White, Looks Mexican
programme.desc: Sacramento California born Key Lewis is a high energy, improvisational, storytelling, multiple-personality nutcase! His love for the people and hunger for the stage is his undying motivation. His comedic stories about his interracial childhood, family, and unusual views on relationships, make Key simply a joy to watch. His ability to improvise and interact with all types of crowds makes this up and coming comic and actor one to look out for. Key Lewis has appeared on Marlon Wayans TBSís Funniest Wins, Starz Networks StaannDup, Kevin Harts One Mic Stand as well as Bill Bellamyís Whoís Got Jokes! Key says, chase your dream, always know your audience donít act funny, be funny... donít worry about the quantity of your material but the quality the sooner you create a relationship with your crowd, the better you will be. Television: Bill Bellamyís Whoís Got Jokes on TVONE. BETíS One Mic Stand Hosted by Kevin Hart. Starz Network Comedy Series called StaannDup, Marlon Wayanís TBSís Funniest Wins! Competitions: Winner of the 2013 Rocky Mountain Laugh Off, Finalist in the 2010 Bay Area Black Comedy Competition, Semi-Finalist 2009 San Francisco International Comedy Competition, a Semi-Finalist in the 2008 Boston Comedy Festival, 2007 Seattle International Comedy Competition Finalist, Shades of Laughs Portland Oregon Winner, TVONE Bill Bellamyís Who Got Jokeís Contestant. Radio: Improv work with FM Morning Shows (Top 40 Radio): KSFM 102.5 (Sacramento, CA), KWOD 106.5 (Sacramento, CA) KWIN 97.7 ñ Stockton/Lodi, CA, Mix 107.9 Salt Lake City UT (Is It Racist Segment) & The Man Panel. Concerts/Festivals: Opened for Jon B. and Keysha Cole, Taste Of Tacoma, & Bite Of Seattle Fountain Stage 5 Years Running! Key Lewis has worked with the likes of Kevin Hart, Pablo Francisco, Sam Bam, Alonzo Bodden, Jay London, Gabriel Iglesias, Brooks McBeth, Tommy Davidson, Katt Williams, De-Ray Davis, Andrew Norelli, Lonnie Love, Jeff Garcia, Damon Wayans, Joey Diaz, Guy Torry, Darren Carter, Paul Mooney, Kermet Apio and many more.

programme.title: Tom Clark
programme.desc: Tom Clark was born and raised, in that order. Clark's mix of well-crafted jokes and spontaneous crowd work has led to appearances on TBS's ‘Conan,' CBS's ‘Late Late Show, and Comedy Central's ‘Premium Blend'. Clark has traveled coast to coast doing stand up and has performed internationally as part of New Faces at the prestigious‘Just For Laughs Comedy Festival' in Montreal and on The Main Stage at ‘The Capetown Comedy Festival' in South Africa. Clark is also an actor and has appeared on such shows as NBC's ‘Outsourced', TNT's ‘The Closer',and the Hallmark made for TV movie ‘The Wish List'. After landing the role on ‘Outsourced,' director Ken Kwapis invited Clark to be in the Drew Barrymore movie, ‘Big Miracle'. You can also see Clark in Columbia Pictures ‘Freaks of Nature.'

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

Young 4) Do politics make us irrational? | Jay Van Bavel 5) 3 kinds of bias that shape your worldview | J. Marshall Shepherd

programme.title: Say What? EP01
programme.desc: (1) The benefits of a bilingual brain - Mia Nacamulli (2) 4 reasons to learn a new language | John McWhorter (3) How language shapes the way we think | Lera Boroditsky (4) What is dyslexia? - Kelli Sandman-Hurley (5) The secrets of learning a new language | Lýdia Machová (6) Where did English come from? - Claire Bowern (7) 3 ways to speak English | Jamila Lyiscott

programme.title: Say What? EP02

programme.title: School Smarts EP01

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricanes '07
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show – a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hot and Cold Crystals
programme.desc: Miners in Chihauhau, Mexico, has just discovered an amazing sight. Deep in the earth, only 300 feet from a pocket of molten magma, is an amazing chamber filled with giant blue and pink crystals – some as big as 60 feet long! It is an extraordinary find – and one that is very difficult to witness, as temperatures run to 150 F, with 100% humidity. The Mexican authorities are only opening up the cavern to scientists and film crews – “Angry Planet” plans to be one of the first in!

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hawaii
programme.desc: We have filmed extensively in Hawaii, filming big-wave surfing at the famous Banzai Pipeline on Oahu's North Shore, and filming George surfing with the “Hawaian Fire” firefighters. We have also filmed at the Hawaii Tsunami Institute and in Hilo, site of major Tsunami damage in both 1946 and 1964. We also have filmed extensively at Kilawea Volcano, filming the amazing sight of rivers and waterfalls of red hot lava flowing into the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Kenya
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Here's the deal: Mt. Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here's the first kicker: High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with their tusks in order to eat the salty rock. Here's the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus – the world's most deadly virus. So here's the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 4.10
programme.desc: What good is the warmth of summer, without the cold of the Winter.

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.2
programme.desc: Far from the reaches of human society, the animal kingdom thrives.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Shifting Winds
programme.desc: Mark and Jaclyn make their annual trek to Tornado Alley and this time they are looking for more than severe thunderstorms and tornadoes. They also want answers as to whether Climate Change is causing changes to Tornado Alley.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Height of Ruin
programme.desc: Adventurer George Kourounis joins Mark and Jaclyn on a journey to Nepal. They witness the devastation caused by the deadly 2015 earthquake, see first-hand the reconstruction efforts, and are awed by the warmth and hospitality of the Nepalese people.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the world's biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Blizzard
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the world's worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet – 231 miles per hour – was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a “human popsicle”, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Council's high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water Two
programme.desc: One of the most exciting episodes of season one is “Wild Water” – our look at Great White Sharks, water-filled caves and high voltage marine action.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricanes '07
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show – a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

And the Big Bitty City Dancers are a force to be reckoned with. They are elegant and beautifully synchronized. Plum shows the girls a maze of dance steps that she's choreographed in the hopes of creating a winning piece. The problem is, the contest is only 1 week away!

programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Raiders of the Lost Jewel / In Gronk We Trust: Professor Woodraven enlists the help of the Paq to find the famed Jewel of Kaheelee hidden somewhere in the wilds outside of Orlanta. Himari, Fleming, and Klaus jump at the chance, but not all is as it seems. When the Professor turns out to be an impostor, the Paw must race to save the precious jewel from the thief. / Shaq hosts a charity basketball game and tasks each member of the Paq with picking up items and helping set up for the event. Gronk begs Shaq to let him pick up the most important item, the winning trophy, and Shaq agrees. The rest of the Paq thinks it's a bad idea, but Gronk aims to prove them wrong. After getting distracted multiple times, Gronk has to dig deep to prove that Shaq's trust in his wasn't a mistake.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - The Donut Caper / Klaus' Lie: Marlowe Sternwood, the Girl Fun Group Troop Leader, asks the Paq to help find the missing delivery of the annual assorted donut sale's donuts. Biggie D, Fleming, and Tibbs race out to find out what happened with the missing truck. Quickly they discover the evil Keeter Reebus is behind it and they have to locate the missing shipment before time runs out / Klaus tells Shaq that he needs maintenance to get out of volunteering on the first day of the Boys and Girls Club Rolling Wood Derby so he can race Niccolo Tessio. After winning, he thinks he's in the clear and can make the derby the next day. When Niccolo challenges him to yet another race, Klaus has to decided what's more important: beating Niccolo or fulfilling his promise to Shaq.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - Why So Crabby? / Surprise! It's a Forest Fire!: When the carbon emissions from Preston's oceanfront mansion cause the local lobsters to get cracks in their shells, the Rangers must find a way to help. / While glamping with Preston, Patty Praxton does a gender reveal for her new pony and accidentally causes a forest fire.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - Peek-a-Boo Beluga: When a beluga whale gets lost and ends up in New England, Preston wants to keep her and won't let the Rangers take her home. The Rangers must stop Priscilla's cheaply made solar-paneled drones which have gone haywire before they overcharge and explode.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Atomic Betty - The Doppelganger / Cosmic Cake: Betty and Noah get separated while visiting a house of mirrors at an amusement park and Betty is called off on a mission to protect a pair of scientists and their cargo from an evil shapeshifting spy known as The Chameleon/ Maximus, along with Evil Chef Bernadette, has a birthday party for himself on the planet Celebra, including a cake with a mind controlling icing! While Penelope has her own birthday plans on Earth

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Atomic Betty - But the Cat Came Back: Purssy keeps sneaking into Betty's room and messing it up while she's away on galactic missions. programme.title: Shaq's Garage

When lighting strikes the trash, it unleashes a monster that leaves Himari alone to defeat / Prince Jaffa arrives in Orlanta from Kinshasa, Africa for an official visit and stays at Shaq's house. Despite strict orders by Prince Jaffa's chaperone to not leave the garage after a long day of Princely duties, Himari convinces Prince Jaffa to sneak out with her and Fleming to experience what it's like being a normal teenager.

programme.title: The Berry Best Taste Test
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball. A madcap chase ensues as Apple tries to stop the airmail postal bees from delivering the cake.

programme.title: Doggie Dance No-Show
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show. It's up to Strawberry to help Huck see that he should not force TomTom into something he just doesn't want to do.

programme.title: The Rolie Polie

programme.title: Sky's the Limit

programme.title: Sarah Vaughan, Richard Davis, Ronnell Bright & Art Morgan
programme.desc: Sarah Vaughan: Live in '58 & 64 features the Divine One in her prime, wrapping her sultry voice around jazz standards such as “Lover Man”, “Misty”, and “I Got Rhythm” and popular showtunes such as “Over The Rainbow” and “Maria”. One of the greatest voices of the 20th Century, her renditions of songs by Harold Arlen, Leonard Bernstein, Johnny Burke, the Gershwins, and Stephen Sondheim are pure diva magic. These three performances demonstrate why Sarah Vaughan is invariably mentioned in the same breath as Ella Fitzgerald and Billie Holiday.

programme.title: Bill Evans
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Jazzmeia Horn
programme.desc: Vocalist Jazzmeia Horn's 2019 Malta Jazz Festival appearance was a celebration of jazz's future, infused with the soul of its past. Featuring Keith Brown (piano), Rashaan Carter (bass), Irwin Hall (flute and saxophone), and Anwar Marshall (drums), the young singer's performance was a reminder of jazz's enduring power to speak to the heart. Situated at the Valletta waterfront outside Our Lady of Liesse Church, Horn's concert was a truly spellbinding experience.

programme.title: Sun Ra
programme.sub-title: Sun Ra Arkestra - Estival Jazz Lugano
programme.desc: Estival Jazz Lugano is an annual open-air music festival that takes place over five days at the picturesque city of Lugano, Switzerland. Since 1979, this musical Mecca has been a must-attend event for all jazz and world music fans worldwide. On July 3, 1985, pianist and space-faring jazz icon Sun Ra and his Arkestra crash-landed at Estival Jazz Lugano. Featuring saxophonists Marshall Allen, John Gilmore and Danny Ray Thompson, clarinetist Eloe Omoe, flautist James Jackson, trombonist Tyrone Hill and a cavalcade of other costumed talents, Sun Ra puts on a truly out-of-this-world concert.

programme.title: Laurent de Wilde
programme.desc: Jazz à Vienne is one of the world's most prestigious jazz festivals. Ever since 1981, it has attracted a mix of jazz legends and exciting newcomers, with many of them playing return engagements. Each year welcomes outstanding international stars to the historical Le Théâtre Antique to impress and inspire their audiences. In 2017, French pianist Laurent de Wilde performed his tribute to jazz icon Thelonious Monk at Jazz à Vienne. Alongside bassist Jérôme Regard and drummer Donald Kontomanou, De Wilde gives a respectful and engaging homage built upon 20 years of study.

programme.title: Dizzy Gillespie, Tony Coe, Derek Humble & Billy Mitchell
programme.desc: American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader Dizzy Gillespie (1917-1993) was one of the seminal figures of the bebop movement. He fuses all musical forms rooted in African culture, such as music from Cuba, Latin America and the Caribbean, into his music. On November 4, 1970 he played a concert in Denmark with the Kenny Clarke/Francy Boland Big Band, performing Con Alma, Brother K, Now Hear My Meanin', Manteca, Let Me Outta Here, and Things Are Here.

programme.title: Jimmy Smith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Miriam Makeba, J.K. Naimro, Stanley Todd & Al Sanders
programme.sub-title: Miriam Makeba Live at Estival Lugano 1985
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. Miriam Makeba, also named Mama Africa, was a South African singer, actress, United Nations goodwill ambassador, and civil-rights activist. Her career flourished in the US, where she released several albums. Makeba was among the first African musicians to receive worldwide recognition. She brought African music to a Western audience, and popularized the world music and Afropop genres. Her performances at Estival Lugano is beyond incredible. Her voice, the power and the soul summarizes her musicality in 40 minutes, together with her band and extremely talented backing-vocals.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Louis Armstrong
programme.desc: Following a highly successful small-group jazz concert at New York Town Hall on May 17, 1947, Armstrong's manager Joe Glaser dissolved the Armstrong big band on August 13, 1947 and established a six-piece small group. This group was called the All Stars, and in 1964 Louis Armstrong recorded his biggest-selling record, Hello, Dolly! He made assorted television appearances, especially in the 1950s and 1960s – the recorded film was a TV Show in Australia when Armstrong was at the peak of his career. Armstrong kept up his busy tour schedule until a few years before his death in 1971. He also toured Africa, Europe, and Asia under sponsorship of the US State Department with great success, earning the nickname ‘Ambassador Satch'.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Jamie Cullum
programme.desc: Watch the performance of Jamie Cullum live at Jazz à Vienne, in 2017.

programme.title: Kevin John Edusei
programme.desc: In October 2020, German conductor Kevin John Edusei made his London Symphony Orchestra debut and leads the orchestra in a beautiful performance of the suite from Mendelssohn's “A Midsummer Night's Dream”, Boulanger's “D'un matin de printemps” and Schumann's 'Spring' Symphony. Edusei is regularly praised for the drama and tension that he brings to his music-making, and for his clear sense of architecture and attention to detail.

programme.title: Orquesta Filamonica de Buenos Aires, Carlos Gari, Daniel Barenboim & Mora Godoy
programme.sub-title: A Tango Night - Live from Buenos Aires
programme.desc: 2006 closed with a spectacular festival of Argentinean music broadcast live from Buenos Aires. At the height of the Argentinean summer, the Orquesta Filarmónica del Teatro Colon under Daniel Barenboim (conductor & soloist) join bandoneon virtuoso Leopoldo Federico and his Orquesta Tipica for an extraordinary New Year's Eve show with popular tangos and Latin American orchestra classics. The old master of tango, José Carli, created enchanting new arrangements of works by Argentinean artists Astor Piazzolla, Carlos Gardel, Julio de Caro, Alberto Ginastera and Horacio Salgán. Performances by leading tango dancers Mora Godoy and Junior Cervilla from Buenos Aires add atmosphere and round off the night.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Lily Maisky, Iddo Bar-Shai & Tedi Papavrami
programme.sub-title: Martha Argerich – A Birthday Celebration III
programme.desc: On the occasion of her 80th birthday, Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich explored chamber music repertoire in this wonderful concert, recorded at Château de Chantilly, France. The ‘Grande Dame' of the piano is joined by various renowned artists, including pianists Lily Maisky and Iddo Bar-Shaï, violinists Tedi Papavrami and Akiko Suwanai, her daughter Lyda Chen-Argerich on viola, and cellist Mischa Maisky. On the program are Felix Mendelssohn's Piano Trio No. 1 in D minor, Op. 49 Leoš Janáček's Violin Sonata Franz Schubert's Rondo in A major, D. 951 and Johannes Brahms's Piano Quartet No. 3 in C minor, Op. 60. These performances were recorded on May 4 and June 13, 2021.

programme.title: Mariss Jansons
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Ludwig Wicki, Danish National Symphony Orchestra, DR Junior Choir & Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Ludwig Wicki leads the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and the DR Junior Choir in a sparkling concert program of film music. The program features a selection of music from great and Oscar-winning Hollywood films, including Titanic, The Bodyguard, Pirates of the Caribbean, Braveheart, and Moulin Rouge, written by major composers such as John Williams, Hans Zimmer, James Horner, and Klaus Badelt. Highlights include ‘He's a pirate/Davy Jones' from Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest ‘Now We Are Free' from Gladiator ‘My Heart Will Go On' from Titanic and ‘Shallow' from A Star Is Born. Featured soloists in this concert are the young talented singers Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger and Diluckshan Jeyaratnam. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2022.

programme.title: Jeff Beck
programme.sub-title: Rock and Roll Party Honoring Les Paul
programme.desc: Filmed on 9 June 2010 at the Irridium Jazz Club in New York City, forever associated with the legendary Les Paul, this show captures Jeff Beck celebrating the great man with a selection of Les Paul songs and other great rock 'n' roll tracks on what would have been Les Paul's 95th birthday. Jeff Beck is joined by some very special guests including Imelda May and her band led by Darrel Higham on many of the tracks plus appearances by Gary US Bonds, Brian Setzer and Trombone Shorty. The intimate setting puts you right there in the audience for a performance featuring stunning musicianship and truly great songs.

programme.title: Linkin Park
programme.desc: Filmed at the Madison Square Garden in New York, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Linkin Park performs hits including "Numb", "In The End", "Bleed it Out" and many more.

programme.title: Rush
programme.desc: Rush's 'Time Machine' shows in 2010/11 were one of the most anticipated tours ever. Celebrating 30 years since the 1981 release of their classic bestselling album 'Moving Pictures' the band performed the entire album live for the first time as the centrepiece of the concerts. The shows also featured favourite tracks from across their lengthy career and two recent ones. As ever the concerts were a visual feast and sounded great with the band playing at the top of their form.

programme.title: Muse
programme.sub-title: Live at Festival Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring (Nürburgring), Rock Im Park (Nuremberg) is a music festival that takes place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in western Germany. Featuring Muse.

programme.title: Flying Over Fiji Islands 2
programme.desc: "Flying over Fiji Islands 2" offers a 1-hour and 42-minute journey across Fiji's majestic landscapes. Combining nature sounds with ambient music by The Cynic Project, it features smooth ground-level and aerial shots, concluding with a breathtaking real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Above the Spanish Islands
programme.desc: Sun-drenched Canary and Balearic islands from the air. Turquoise bays, volcanic terrain, and dramatic cliffs in high-energy drone cinematography.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Lost in Paradise w Music
programme.desc: Have you ever wanted to just escape everything and teleport yourself to an uncharted, idyllic tropical island paradise and relax there all day? Now you can do just that with this one hour long high definition nature experience which slowly transports the viewer around two different remote islands hidden in the south Pacific. You'll begin at sunrise, far far away from any worries or responsibilities...and as the day progresses you'll slowly make your way from white sandy shorelines to verdant green mountaintops, ending at sunset.
